title: elymus arenarius var. brevispicus
intro: Elymus arenarius var. brevispicus, also known as beach wildrye, is a subspecies of coastal grass native to Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elymus arenarius var. brevispicus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
